caption: A man with dark skin, wearing glasses, headphones, and a distinctive tall, grey, textured wig, is speaking into a professional microphone. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He is positioned in a room with a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items, including a "LEE" garment. A logo appearing on the screen reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, his facial expressions shifting slightly as he emphasizes points, and his right arm moves subtly into the frame. He remains centered in the shot throughout, facing toward the microphone while talking. The background remains static, and the lighting is consistent across the scenes.
